name: a React vision does put the React-specific namespace in the consult scope via family activation
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a dashboard built with React" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["family_activated"].include?("react") && c["namespaces"].include?("react") ? 0:1)' && echo react-vision-react 1>&2
